title: Approve stage map and gate criteria
goal: Split the first implementation task into stages, define pass/fail criteria, define allowed/forbidden paths, define scripts and capabilities, and produce READY_FOR_AGENT gate candidate.
scope: Finalize stage map from draft to approved
Define pass/fail criteria for each stage
Define required scripts and capabilities per stage
non_goals: Do not mark READY_FOR_AGENT true without Owner approval
owner_intent: Produce an approved stage map with clear boundaries that enables safe agent execution.
risks: Stage map too vague for safe agent execution
Missing pass/fail criteria allows fake green
open_questions: What minimum pass criteria prevent fake green?
Should each stage have independent Owner gate?
no_fake_green_note: Stage map approval does not prove implementation is complete or correct.
